summary: Comprehensive testing of new cybersecurity training platform features. Fixed critical bug in forgot-password email service. All backend APIs and frontend UI components tested and working correctly.

critical.issue: FIXED - NotImplementedError: Database objects do not implement truth value testing. Changed 'if db:' to 'if db is not None:' in email_service.py

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: In /app/backend/services/email_service.py, 3 instances of 'if db:' were changed to 'if db is not None:' due to MongoDB database objects not implementing bool()
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rate limiter on login is 5 requests/minute. Token caching implemented in tests. Email sending configured via SendGrid - forgot password emails are sent.

forgot_password_flow.details: Auth page has 'Forgot password?' link, mode switch works, email submission successful. Backend sends reset email via SendGrid.

email_templates_page.details: 4 templates displayed (Welcome, Password Reset Admin, Forgot Password, Password Expiry Reminder). Edit and Preview buttons functional. Preview dialog shows rendered template with sample data.

advanced_analytics_page.details: Stats cards show Total Users, Phishing Campaigns, Emails Sent, Click Rate. User Distribution section shows Active/Inactive users. Risk Assessment Summary with recommendations.

password_policy_settings.details: Settings page has Password Policy section with expiry days input and reminder days. Quick preset buttons (Never, 30, 60, 90, 180 Days). Save Password Policy button functional.

sidebar_collapse.details: Sidebar collapse button works. Expands from 64px (collapsed) to 256px (expanded). Menu groups can be expanded/collapsed by clicking headers.

security_dashboard.details: Summary cards show Successful Logins, Failed Logins, Account Lockouts, Password Resets, Active Lockouts (24h). Active Lockouts section, Suspicious IPs section, Login Activity chart, Audit Logs table with filters and pagination.

favicon.details: Favicon at /favicon.svg loads correctly. HTML head contains <link rel='icon' href='/favicon.svg'>
